title: Crispy Middle Eastern Sweet Potato Stir-fry
description: This sweet and crisp Middle Eastern dish features a unique blend of ketchup for added sweetness and a crowd-pleasing flavor profile that is both savory and diabetic-friendly.
instructions: Preheat your broiler. Cut the sweet potatoes into thick slices.
Season both sides of the potato slices with salt, paprika, turmeric powder, and a drizzle of oil.
Place the seasoned potato slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or aluminum foil for easy clean-up.
Bake at 450°F (230°C) until golden brown and crispy, about 10-15 minutes.
Meanwhile, in a small bowl mix together ketchup, minced garlic, and chopped onion. Stir until well combined.
Once the sweet potatoes are ready, remove from oven and immediately pour the ketchup mixture over them while they're still hot to ensure that the flavors meld together.
Serve hot as an appetizer or side dish.
